blocks.body: Geographic names in English can be used with the article or without the article depending on the type of object. Countries, cities, continents usually do not have an article, but oceans, rivers, mountain systems, and some countries-unions need the.

{ "title": "12. Brief Synopsis", "items": [ "No article: Most countries, all cities, continents, individual mountains and islands.", "With the article the: oceans, seas, rivers, mountain systems, island groups, deserts.", "Countries with the: unions (the USA, the UK), plural (the Netherlands, the Philippines).", "The only city with the: The Hague (The Hague) the Gambia, the Congo, the Sudan.", "Mount + назва — без артикля: Mount Everest.", "Lake + назва — без артикля: Lake Baikal.", "Гірські системи — з the: the Alps, the Carpathians.", "Історичні винятки: the Gambia, the Congo, the Sudan." ] }
